note: Task 2 was reshaped into a 3-stage box curriculum mid-execution. See 2026-06-10-boost-pad-home-PROGRESS.md for the full handoff, validated geometry, and gotchas.

tasks.subject: Task 0: Shared correct-double-jump maneuver harness
tasks.description: DoubleJumpVaultAgent (apex-fired max double jump = strongest cheese), BoxHopAgent, helpers fresh_world/find_entity/run_segment in tests/segment_maneuvers.py. Reviewed.

tasks.subject: Task 1: LavaGapChunk + shared build_lava_pit helper
tasks.description: build_lava_pit() shared helper + boxless full-height-lava LavaGapChunk (registry 'lava_gap', sampler_include=False) for boost-gap. BoxLavaGap refactored to reuse it, behavior unchanged. Reviewed.

tasks.subject: Task 2a: Pre-placed-box option + box-step solver agents (foundation)
tasks.description: BoxLavaGap gained box_frac (None=approach ledge/push; set=pre-placed mid-pit on floor). Added SingleStepAgent + DoubleStepAgent to tests/segment_maneuvers.py. Reviewed.

tasks.subject: Task 2b: Stage 1 BoxStepSegment (single-jump onto box)
tasks.description: IMPLEMENTED + COMMITTED; spec+quality review PENDING (resume here). BoxStepSegment: Flat(2)|Flat(3)|BoxLavaGap(pit=24,depth=72,box=64,box_frac=0.5)|Goal(2). probes/tune_box_step.py prints SAFE set. Tests: solvable-by-SingleStepAgent, vault-proof (box removed), composition. NOT yet in SEGMENT_TEMPLATES (Task 4 wires it).

tasks.subject: Task 2c: Stage 2 BoxLeapSegment (double-jump onto bigger box)
tasks.description: Add BoxLeapSegment: Flat(2)|Flat(3)|BoxLavaGap(pit~38,depth=96,box=96,box_frac~0.52)|Goal(2), tier 3. probes/tune_box_leap.py MUST find a ROBUST cell (stage-2 was marginal at launch_x=230 only in 2a — sweep depth/frac/box). Tests: solvable-by-DoubleStepAgent, vault-proof, not-single-jumpable, composition. Not in SEGMENT_TEMPLATES yet.

tasks.subject: Task 2d: Stage 3 retune BoxLavaSegment (push box; drop boost pad)
tasks.description: Remove BoostPadChunk from BoxLavaSegment+KeyDoorBoxLavaSegment; replace with Flat(3) spacer to keep pit_left=256. Fix pit=22, depth=72. Delete/replace test_boxlava_random_varies_pit_width. Vault-proof test via box-removed DoubleJumpVaultAgent. Attempt push-based BoxHopAgent solve; CONTINGENCY: if no reliable scripted solve, flag stage 3 expert (commit only vault-proof+composition, no solvable test). Do NOT change box size/mechanic.

tasks.subject: Task 3: BoostGapSegment (boost-or-die lava gap)
tasks.description: probes/tune_boost_gap.py sweeps gap W. BoostGapSegment (tier 2, DOUBLE_JUMP): Flat(long runway, ~8 tiles, NOT spawn-on-pad per David) | BoostPad(3) | LavaGapChunk(W) | Goal(2). Tests: solvable-with-boost (DoubleJumpVaultAgent), anti-cheese pad-stripped dies, composition. Boost is 30% stronger now so reach is larger.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire segments into sampler + fix false-confidence vault test
tasks.description: Add BoxStepSegment, BoxLeapSegment, BoostGapSegment to SEGMENT_TEMPLATES (keep curriculum difficulty order via tiers). Update the tier-registration count test to the new template count. Repoint test_boxlava_pit_requires_the_box_not_vaultable at DoubleJumpVaultAgent. Sampler test: BoostGap sampled only with DOUBLE_JUMP. Full pytest green.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Weld seams on gym segment materialize (polish)
tasks.description: Call weld_ground_seams(world.space) after SegmentStream materializes a segment; test it ran. Cosmetic.
